home.drop_hint: Drop a Formidable bundle (.bundle) here to view it offline.

unlock.title: Enter password
unlock.hint: This bundle is encrypted. Enter its password to open it.

settings.title: Settings
settings.serve_http_help: Also expose the open bundle on your network so it can be viewed in a browser or on another device.
settings.serve_api_help: Expose the bundle's collection data as a read-only REST API, so AI agents and scripts can query it. On the network only when "Serve bundle over HTTP" is also on.
settings.api_token_help: Requests to the data endpoints must send this key (header X-API-Key, Authorization Bearer, or ?key=). Set your own, or generate one. The docs and spec stay open so an agent can discover the API.
settings.api_no_data: This bundle has no queryable data; open one exported with collection templates.
